description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing locales, a full set of system packages (git, python3‑pip, libpq-dev, libjpeg-dev, zlib1g-dev, libxml2-dev, libxslt1-dev, libgeos-dev, python3‑cairocffi, tidy, libtidy-dev, binutils, libproj-dev, gdal-bin, libpangocairo-1.0-0, pandoc, graphviz, python3‑argon2, file, gettext, postgresql, postgresql-13-postgis-3), installs Python requirements with pip3, copies a Makefile, creates a PostgreSQL user and two databases with postgis extensions, and sets the user password; after each job a global after_script drops the databases and user. Define a build‑v4 job in the build stage that runs only on the main and develop branches, executes a sed replacement in settings.py, copies example_project/local_settings.py.gitlab-ci, creates /var/log/django/, and runs make build_gitlab. Define a debian job in the test stage that runs only on the bullseye branch, installs devscripts, build‑essential, lintian, wget, dh‑python, python3‑all, and other dependencies, adds the iggdrasil APT repository, parses debian/control to install additional Python packages, copies the Makefile, builds a Debian package with make deb, installs the resulting .deb, starts PostgreSQL, prepares an instance, creates a test database with postgis, and runs Django tests for specific apps via python3 ./manage.py test. Define a test‑v4 job in the test stage that runs only on the main and develop branches, performs the same sed and settings copy as build‑v4, creates the log directory, and runs make soft_test_gitlab. Use the default shell executor (no explicit Docker image) and tag the jobs with bullseye-shell or bullseye as specified.
